items.title: Want To Lose Money? Let Politics Rule Your Investment Decisions.
items.description: Discover smart investment strategies: stay disciplined, manage cash reserves, and seize market opportunities while ignoring short-term political noise.

items.title: Foreign Investors Pull $37 Billion From US Stocks In May—Largest Monthly Exit In A Year: Exodus Amid Market Recovery, 90-Day Tariff Pause
items.description: New figures from U.S. equity markets indicate a troubling trend, as foreign investors pull back amid mounting uncertainties and persistent volatility over the past two months.

items.title: A fresh inflation reading greets a stock market back near all-time highs: What to know this week
items.description: The May Consumer Price Index (CPI) is set to headline the week as the S&P 500 hovers near a new all-time high for the first time since February.

items.title: Major Market Disconnect: 2 High-Flying Funds That Remain Dirt Cheap
items.description: It is rare to buy an investment that is deeply discounted and enjoying strong momentum. Check out two ETFs that remain at a compelling valuation.

items.title: Forget About Rate Cuts As Inflation Heads Sharply Higher
items.description: Inflation is set to rise above 3% by 2025, aligning with post-2022 trends. Read why rate cuts are unlikely and what this means for markets.
